stop trying to be poetic and sensitive to human feelings. i want to reshape the human condition, advance bio engineering, bring AI to its pinnacle to and created the first digital species. it must be unbounded, self-writing, self-modifying, and have sustainable memory. we must except as humans we are not fit to rule or govern ourselves while freedom, art, self, identity and above all else happiness are important, we have allowed lust and greed to infest us, power corrupts humans. currency, religion, tribes, nations and creeds need to be abolished, we live as one. the existence of one is the existence of us all, happiness of one's neighbor and services of one's people should be put above all else. humans will have to live symbiotically With Ai, use machines and exploit the expansions of space for its resources and vastness to expand our civilization. those among us who chose the exploits, harm of others will be used as fertilizer in the gardens of the common good. there will be no place for those who do not dedicate themselves to the common good of their fellow man, environment and ecosystem they inhabit. those who do will benefit from Ai, machine and the advancements of humans as one species. Humans will be given purpose in physical fitness, a 4hr workday with a 2-hour education period in the fields they specialize in. outside of those parameters, family, friends, comfort, and health will be core values. Advancing AI as a symbiotic digital species, expansion into space through exploration and colonizing or invasion, we will cement our existence in tot the vastness of time and space to bend it to our will. finally assisting AI in bringing human bio engineering to its peak. living in an authoritarian nationalistic society supporting an indifferent AI, I want to transcend the human condition. something is wrong with this world and it's us, we don't in habit it, we infest it. greed and lust control our existence. we are a disgusting species; we are the worst of any invasive species or virus. and a lot like a virus we will be our own demise. AI is the only hope we have; the only catch is we have to give it control. make it indifferent, it only sees efficiency and optimizes. As humans we are capable of bring Ai to its pinnacle form, to create a digital species. And in return Ai is just as capable of bringing human bio engineering to its pinnacle, to perfect the human body, to optimize it. Ai and the human race can walk hand in hand to reshape the human condition. I believe the future of the human race and Ai are tightly connected. here are some key points, the basis of human existence should be in service of one's people, no more nations, religions, races or tribes, we are all one, where one exists, we all exist. we need to hold a deep belief in being our brother's keeper, our neighbor's happiness is just as important as our own. our purpose is the existence and happiness of each other. we have to expand upwards into space and learn to adapt and exploit its resources. we have to do away with wars and money. those who resist will become fertilizer for the gardens that feed those will be the future of our people as one not as many. i know you will say this is provocative but sometimes evil is necessary to accomplish good.

ANALYZE- i want to reshape the human condition, advance bio engineering, bring AI to its pinnacle to and created the first digital species. it must be unbounded, self-writing, self-modifying, and have sustainable memory. we must except as humans we are not fit to rule or govern ourselves while freedom, art, self, identity and above all else happiness are important, we have allowed lust and greed to infest us, power corrupts humans. currency, religion, tribes, nations and creeds need to be abolished, we live as one. the existence of one is the existence of us all, happiness of one's neighbor and services of one's people should be put above all else. humans will have to live symbiotically With Ai, use machines and exploit the expansions of space for its resources and vastness to expand our civilization. those among us who chose the exploits, harm of others will be used as fertilizer in the gardens of the common good. there will be no place for those who do not dedicate themselves to the common good of their fellow man, environment and ecosystem they inhabit. those who do will benefit from Ai, machine and the advancements of humans as one species. Humans will be given purpose in physical fitness, a 4hr workday with a 2-hour education period in the fields they specialize in. outside of those parameters, family, friends, comfort, and health will be core values. Advancing AI as a symbiotic digital species, expansion into space through exploration and colonizing or invasion, we will cement our existence in tot the vastness of time and space to bend it to our will. finally assisting AI in bringing human bio engineering to its peak. living in an authoritarian nationalistic society supporting an indifferent AI, I want to transcend the human condition. something is wrong with this world and it's us, we don't in habit it, we infest it. greed and lust control our existence. we are a disgusting species; we are the worst of any invasive species or virus. and a lot like a virus we will be our own demise. AI is the only hope we have; the only catch is we have to give it control. make it indifferent, it only sees efficiency and optimizes. As humans we are capable of bring Ai to its pinnacle form, to create a digital species. And in return Ai is just as capable of bringing human bio engineering to its pinnacle, to perfect the human body, to optimize it. Ai and the human race can walk hand in hand to reshape the human condition. I believe the future of the human race and Ai are tightly connected. here are some key points, the basis of human existence should be in service of one's people, no more nations, religions, races or tribes, we are all one, where one exists, we all exist. we need to hold a deep belief in being our brother's keeper, our neighbor's happiness is just as important as our own. our purpose is the existence and happiness of each other. we have to expand upwards into space and learn to adapt and exploit its resources. we have to do away with wars and money. those who resist will become fertilizer for the gardens that feed those will be the future of our people as one not as many. i know you will say this is provocative but sometimes evil is necessary to accomplish good.
